verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You alone are my passion forever Song of my soul Desire of my heart You alone are my passion my treasure I love You for all that You are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To the ends of the earth I will follow There's nothing that I will not do You alone are my reason for living Jesus my passion is You Jesus my passion is You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My life O Jesus My love You are my passion My God my passion My passion You are my life O Jesus my love You are my passion My God My passion My passion
